content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Boring Apartments". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1433/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains a single integer n. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal.

solution.approach: Find the median of the array and calculate the total absolute difference between each element and the median.
solution.timeComplexity: O(n log n) due to sorting
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) if sorting is done in-place

code.Python3:
import sys
for _ in range(int(input())):
    n = int(input())
    arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
    arr.sort()
    median = arr[n // 2]
    sum = 0
    for i in range(n):
        sum += abs(arr[i] - median)
    print(sum)
